description.value:
This kit includes all of the necessary implements to prepare and serve food for up to six people at any single time.

Proficiency with this kit lets you add your proficiency bonus to any skill checks you make to identify or create food or involved with using this kit.

While you have proficiency with this kit you can also use it to do the following; Cook meals with beneficial effects, Create cooked food rations and Military Ration Pills.

Cooking Meal.

By spending 1 charge, you can spend one hour of leisure time or the duration of a short rest cooking a reinvigorating meal for up to six creatures.

A creature who would benefit from this meal gains a number of temporary hit points equal to the Quality of this cooking kit.

(Base: 15, Greater: 20, Superior: 30, Supreme: 45).

Creating Cooked Food Rations.

By spending 1 charge, you can spend 1 hour of leisure time or the duration of a short rest creating and maintaining dried meats, veggies and herbs condensed into an edible block of foodstuff similar in texture to a cookie, known as a Cooked Food Ration.

Creatures who eat this Food Ration are satiated and do not need to eat for the next 24 hours.

At the conclusion of this period of time spend doing this, you create 5 food rations.

Military Ration Pills.

By spending at least 1 charge, you can spend 1 hour of leisure time or the duration of a short rest creating and maintaining special herbs, minerals and other nutrient rich foods condensed into an edible ball of foodstuff similar in texture to a cookie, known as a Military Ration Pill.

When you do, you create a number of single use Military Ration pills of a quality equal to the quality of this Kit, equal to the number of charges spent.

Consuming 3 Cooked Food Rations at once, as an action, can remove 1 Rank of Dazed, Envenomed, Exhaustion or Weakened from a creature with no more than 2 Ranks of said condition, once per long rest.
